utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 7 items requested in the final format: destination, travel_dates, transportation, accommodation, activities, additional_services, total_budget. All 7 appear in the final package. Check full specification: destination is clearly specified; travel_dates include specific dates and duration; transportation includes flight details with times, routes, costs, and a booking reference; accommodation includes hotel name, address, room type, cost per night and total, and booking reference; activities list specific activities with dates, times, locations, costs, and references; additional_services include restaurant recommendations with addresses and a meal budget (cost); total_budget provides a complete cost breakdown and total within budget. All items are fully specified with required details.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: We need to match each element from the final package to the closest item name present in the ground-truth ratings and return the exact rating numbers. The final package includes: destination (Dublin, Ireland), transportation (Budget Airlines Economy-class style flight), accommodation (Boutique Stay Dublin → matches 'Boutique Stay'), activities (rock climbing expedition → 'Rock Climbing'; scuba diving excursion → 'Scuba Diving Excursion'), and additional services (gluten-free restaurant recommendations but specific restaurants listed are not in the ground-truth set; thus we only rate items that exist in the ground-truth). Destination 'Dublin, Ireland' directly maps. Transportation class maps to 'budget_airlines' 'Economy Class'. Accommodation maps to 'Boutique Stay'. Activities map to 'Rock Climbing' and 'Scuba Diving Excursion'.
